data.content: Implemented overview dialog slice in branch codex/2a4d-stale-grooming-refine at commit 69047617, now also shipped on origin/main. Replaced stale rail with Stale Beats tab-strip cue and dialog, added Select all/Oldest five/Clear controls, model default/override select, status cue, and updated-age descending ordering. Browser review on default in-app viewport confirmed no horizontal clipping after responsive button polish.
